Blueprint is capture-first and world-model-product-first. It helps operators and robot teams submit a site, review evidence, package real sites into site-specific world models, and use hosted access plus optional review outputs.

High-priority public URLs:
- /
- /how-it-works
- /world-models
- /for-robot-teams
- /for-site-operators
- /sample-deliverables
- /case-studies
- /pricing
- /solutions
- /faq
- /docs
- /governance
- /contact
- /about
- /careers
- /privacy
- /terms

Full content: /llms-full.txt

API endpoints:
- /api/site-content (public JSON summary of key pages and non-sensitive content)
